name: devix-labs
description: Devix Labs custom plugins for cross-project automation

plugins.name: docs-todos-auditor
plugins.description: Audit docs/todos/ directories against codebase state. Detects completed, stale, or outdated todo docs by cross-referencing git history and source code.

plugins.name: java-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Opinionated Java development plugin with architect, developer, tester, reviewer, and navigator agents guided by Effective Java and shift-left principles.

plugins.name: stonkr
plugins.description: Financial toolkit for Claude — ticker lookups, options analysis, hedging strategies, and portfolio scenarios
